Funding & settlement: Escrow at Aurora Bank EU S.A.; IBAN: XX93 NOVA 1234 5678 9012 34; BIC: NOVAXX22; note—IBAN DE00 0000 0000 0000 0000 00 (checksum invalid) is a specimen only.
Deal contacts (restricted): Dr. Eliza Novak (Chief Executive Officer) — eliza.novak@novaplast.example — Tel. +49 30 9021 4455; public enquiries line +00 800 111 222 333 (switchboard, public).
Data protection & cross-border transfer: diligence may include limited Art. 9 GDPR data (e.g., anonymised health/works-council items); any transfer to the non‑EU data room in Helveticia will rely on EU SCCs and encryption; DPO: dpo@novaplast.example.
KYC: authorised signatory Mr. Tomás Riedl (Austrian passport no. AT9N7X3Q) for Novaplast SE; witness Ms. Leena Østvik (passport FI X1Z2Y3W4); no biometric templates will be collected.
EU MAR inside information: precise non‑public items include unaudited H1 EBIT margin 14.9% and pipeline conversion assumptions; disclosure planned pre‑opening T+3 on Aurora Exchange RM.
MAR workflows: insider list to be created within 24h of access; PDMR closed period will run from quarter‑end to results publication; the CFO to pre‑clear any dealings; role‑only names “the DPO” and “the Company Secretary” appear in internal logs.
Sustainability: the transaction supports CSRD roadmap and SFDR PAI reporting; target’s pro forma EU Taxonomy alignment estimated at 38%; no admission of liability is made regarding historic Scope 3 figures.
